The '''Mine Type A''', also known as the '''Type 1 mine''' or '''Mn/T1''', was an unmanned static defense weapon produced by the armaments manufacturer [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]].

A stationary mine armed with an omnidirectional [[Laser/Legends|laser]] cannon, the Mn/T1 was a cost-effective anti-intruder measure. The laser cannon provided defense against [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], especially weakly [[Deflector shield/Legends|shielded]] fighters like the [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunter]], or completely unshielded craft such as the [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]], and the contact detonation system was effective against [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]], especially when the Mn/T1 was deployed in large numbers as a minefield.

The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[MC40a light cruiser/Legends|MC40a Light Calamari Cruiser]] [[Lulsla (MC40a light cruiser)|''Lulsla'']] was protected by a minefield that included the Mn/T1.

Loyal [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] starfighter [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] was given the tremendously difficult task of single-handedly clearing a minefield composed of Mn/T1s in a fragile [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptor]]. His rebellious superiors gave him this dangerous assignment when his inquisitive nature threatened to reveal [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Harkov]]'s treachery.
